metadata.description: Claude Code skills collection by Executioner1939

plugins.name: moonrepo
plugins.description: moonrepo v2.1 expert — workspace setup, task orchestration, CI/CD pipelines, Docker integration, remote caching, code generation, WASM plugin toolchains, MQL queries, and v1-to-v2 migration. Covers all moon v2.1.0 features and configuration.

plugins.name: utoipa
plugins.description: Rust OpenAPI documentation with utoipa v5.4. Complete macro reference (ToSchema, OpenApi, IntoParams, IntoResponses), path attributes, security schemes, enum handling, validation, and integrations for Axum, Actix-web, Rocket with Swagger UI, Redoc, RapiDoc, and Scalar.

plugins.name: eventcatalog
plugins.description: Document event-driven architectures with EventCatalog. Covers all 12 resource types, 184+ SDK functions, 15+ generator integrations, MCP server with 15 tools, visualizations, schema support (JSON Schema, Avro, Protobuf), authentication, and deployment.

plugins.name: codebase-archaeology
plugins.description: Deep structural analysis of any codebase — extracts business rules, maps data flows, traces dependencies, assesses risk, and produces transformation plans. Supports 7 analysis lenses: migration, architecture, decomposition, risk, documentation, testing, and technical debt.
